raw_consumer_statement: In XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX. I was billed for a service I had used in the past, but not that year. It was XXXX parental security software. XXXX billed anyway. I asked American Express to block the charge and the vendor in XXXX. I asked American Express to block future charges from XXXX. However, in XX/XX/XXXX, a new charge was on my American Express card and American Express said they have no record of a block. If you have a charge, your options are to leave American Express or request or new card with a new number requiring you to update all of your bill pays from that card. American Express does not provide good options nor does it protect you from former vendors.
